title: WORKER OF THE DAY - 211info
text: IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER WORKER OF THE DAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help navigating resources in the community, information about coordinated access, and information and referral services. Assists on a first-come, first-serve basis with resource information and referral. Supplies fluctuate, but when available may provide Trimet day passes, hygiene items, water/snacks, and clothing. Referrals given for services or items of need that are not accessible through the agency. Donations of unisex clothing and household item are accepted. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Donations: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 721-1740 Reception Main phone (503) 721-1740 Worker of the Day [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Services: Walk up or call for more information Donations: Visit website for list of needs and commonly requested items. Walk up with donations. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Limited parking; street parking encouraged. Accessible by MAX blue line and TriMet bus line 20. Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Cleaning Product Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Food Donation Programs General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CORE HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY RESOURCE DESK LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AKA SCIENCE UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
